# A Note Without Frontmatter

This file has no YAML frontmatter at all.

Some text here with a [[wiki-link]] to another note.

## First Section

A heading with [[target#sub-heading]] reference.

Also a markdown link: [external docs](https://example.com).

## Second Section ^sec2-anchor

A block ID at the end of this heading line.

And a block ID at end of line ^inline-block

### Nested Heading ^nested-block

Deeply nested with block ID.

## Third Section

More wiki links:
- [[note-one|First Note]]
- [[note-two]]
- [[#first-section]]
- [[target#^sec2-anchor]]
